class.name: HEGoTask
class.brief_description: Represents an asynchronous task submitted to the HEGo task scheduler.

method.name: get_status
method.description:
Returns the current status of this task as one of the [code]Status[/code] constants: [constant PENDING], [constant RUNNING], [constant COMPLETED], or [constant FAILED].
A task transitions from [constant PENDING] to [constant RUNNING] when the scheduler picks it up, then to [constant COMPLETED] or [constant FAILED] when execution finishes.

method.name: get_result
method.description:
Returns the result produced by the task.
Only meaningful after [method get_status] returns [constant COMPLETED]. The type depends on the originating method. For example, [method HEGoAssetNode.get_parms_dict] produces a [Dictionary], while [method HEGoAssetNode.cook] produces [code]null[/code].

method.name: get_error_message
method.description:
Returns the error message when [method get_status] is [constant FAILED].
Returns an empty string if the task has not failed.

method.name: get_description
method.description: Returns a human-readable description of what this task does, such as [code]"Cook"[/code] or [code]"Set Parameter"[/code].

method.name: get_node_id
method.description: Returns the Houdini node id associated with this task, or [code]-1[/code] if no node is associated.

constants.constant: The task is waiting in the queue and has not started executing.
The task is currently being executed on the background worker thread.
The task finished successfully. The result is available via [method get_result].
The task encountered an error. See [method get_error_message] for details.
